author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--accept-both-conflict
content: Completed: accept-both conflict resolution for knowledge branch. Added has_conflict_markers(), resolve_accept_both(), SyncOutcome struct, handle_rebase_conflict() method. Modified sync() and push() to detect rebase conflicts and fall back to accept-both. Updated all command-layer callers. 8 new unit tests. All 926 tests pass, clippy clean, fmt clean. Committed as cf0f2bd.
